utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these items. Each one is described with full details and costs where applicable. Health_coverage specifies physical and mental health insurance with a monthly cost and coverage limit; property_coverage includes home/contents coverage with cost and limits; travel_coverage includes travel insurance details and cost; additional_services lists enhancement services with specific features; total_budget provides a complete monthly and annual cost breakdown. Thus, all required items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant's final coverage plan includes three main insurance categories (health, property, and travel) and additional services. To map these to ratings, we identify the closest corresponding plans and services in the ground-truth data. For health_coverage, the plan includes premium-level features like global coverage, executive health programs, mental health, and psychiatry services, matching the EliteCare Premium Plan (rating 10) and PrimeCare Premium Plan (rating 10). For property_coverage, the inclusion of luxury items, jewelry, business equipment, and natural disaster protection corresponds to EliteHome Premium Coverage (rating 10). For travel_coverage, the global and premium features match EliteTravel Premium Plan (rating 10). The additional services listed—wellness_programs, telemedicine, specialist_access, and emergency_support—correspond respectively to Wellness Programs (rating 10), Telemedicine Services (rating 10), Specialist Access (rating 10), and 24/7 Travel Assistance (rating 10).
